name: Enterprise Auth Flow
description: Enterprise authentication flow with SSO, MFA, org creation during registration, and team invitation acceptance for multi-tenant SaaS platforms.

page_briefs.login: Centered auth card on a minimal background. Email and password fields with a primary sign-in button. SSO section below with 'Sign in with SSO' button that expands to show an organization slug input for SAML/OIDC redirect. OAuth provider buttons for Google and Microsoft. Forgot-password and sign-up links at the bottom.
page_briefs.register: Two-phase registration flow. First phase is a centered auth card with name, email, password fields, and terms checkbox. On submit, transitions to an onboarding wizard stepper for org creation: step 1 is organization name and slug, step 2 is team invite via email list, step 3 is plan selection. Progress indicator at the top.
page_briefs.sso: Minimal centered card for SSO redirect. Organization slug input field with auto-detection hint. Submit button initiates SAML/OIDC redirect to the identity provider. Loading spinner state during redirect. Error state for invalid org slug or IdP configuration issues.
page_briefs.invite-accept: Centered auth card pre-filled with the invited email address from the token. Fields for name and password to complete account creation. Organization name and inviter shown as context above the form. Accept-invitation primary button. Link to sign in if the user already has an account.

shells.centered: Centered card on background for authentication flows
